mapper.insert: INSERT INTO APPROVAL (DRAFTER_ID, FORM_TYPE_ID, APPROVAL_TITLE, APPROVAL_CONTENT, LEAVE_START_DATE, LEAVE_END_DATE) VALUES (#{drafterId}, #{formTypeId}, #{approvalTitle}, #{approvalContent}, #{leaveStartDate}, #{leaveEndDate})
mapper.select: SELECT ap.*, ft.FORM_TYPE_NAME, e.EMPLOYEE_NAME AS drafterName, d.DEPT_NAME AS drafterDeptName, p.POSITION_NAME AS drafterPositionName, al.STEP_NO AS currentStep FROM APPROVAL_LINE al JOIN APPROVAL ap ON al.APPROVAL_ID = ap.APPROVAL_ID JOIN APPROVAL_FORM_TYPE ft ON ap.FORM_TYPE_ID = ft.FORM_TYPE_ID JOIN EMPLOYEE e ON ap.DRAFTER_ID = e.EMPLOYEE_ID LEFT JOIN DEPARTMENT d ON e.DEPT_ID = d.DEPT_ID LEFT JOIN `POSITION` p ON e.POSITION_ID = p.POSITION_ID WHERE al.APPROVER_ID = #{employeeId} AND al.LINE_STATUS = 'WAIT' AND al.STEP_NO = ( SELECT MIN(STEP_NO) FROM APPROVAL_LINE WHERE APPROVAL_ID = al.APPROVAL_ID AND LINE_STATUS = 'WAIT' ) ORDER BY ap.CREATED_AT DESC

SELECT ap.*, ft.FORM_TYPE_NAME, (SELECT MIN(STEP_NO) FROM APPROVAL_LINE WHERE APPROVAL_ID = ap.APPROVAL_ID AND LINE_STATUS = 'WAIT') AS currentStep FROM APPROVAL ap JOIN APPROVAL_FORM_TYPE ft ON ap.FORM_TYPE_ID = ft.FORM_TYPE_ID WHERE ap.DRAFTER_ID = #{drafterId} ORDER BY ap.CREATED_AT DESC

SELECT DISTINCT ap.*, ft.FORM_TYPE_NAME, e.EMPLOYEE_NAME AS drafterName, d.DEPT_NAME AS drafterDeptName, p.POSITION_NAME AS drafterPositionName, (SELECT MIN(STEP_NO) FROM APPROVAL_LINE WHERE APPROVAL_ID = ap.APPROVAL_ID AND LINE_STATUS = 'WAIT') AS currentStep FROM APPROVAL ap JOIN APPROVAL_FORM_TYPE ft ON ap.FORM_TYPE_ID = ft.FORM_TYPE_ID JOIN EMPLOYEE e ON ap.DRAFTER_ID = e.EMPLOYEE_ID LEFT JOIN DEPARTMENT d ON e.DEPT_ID = d.DEPT_ID LEFT JOIN `POSITION` p ON e.POSITION_ID = p.POSITION_ID WHERE ap.DRAFTER_ID != #{employeeId} AND ap.APPROVAL_ID IN ( SELECT APPROVAL_ID FROM APPROVAL_REFERENCE WHERE DEPT_ID = #{deptId} UNION SELECT APPROVAL_ID FROM APPROVAL_REFERENCE WHERE EMPLOYEE_ID = #{employeeId} UNION SELECT APPROVAL_ID FROM APPROVAL_LINE WHERE APPROVER_ID = #{employeeId} ) ORDER BY ap.CREATED_AT DESC

SELECT ap.*, ft.FORM_TYPE_NAME, e.EMPLOYEE_NAME AS drafterName, d.DEPT_NAME AS drafterDeptName, p.POSITION_NAME AS drafterPositionName, (SELECT MIN(STEP_NO) FROM APPROVAL_LINE WHERE APPROVAL_ID = ap.APPROVAL_ID AND LINE_STATUS = 'WAIT') AS currentStep FROM APPROVAL ap JOIN APPROVAL_FORM_TYPE ft ON ap.FORM_TYPE_ID = ft.FORM_TYPE_ID JOIN EMPLOYEE e ON ap.DRAFTER_ID = e.EMPLOYEE_ID LEFT JOIN DEPARTMENT d ON e.DEPT_ID = d.DEPT_ID LEFT JOIN `POSITION` p ON e.POSITION_ID = p.POSITION_ID WHERE ap.APPROVAL_ID = #{approvalId}
